summary: Overnight, the daemon fleet ran on schedule — consolidation, simulation, Nel QA, Dex integrity, Aether metrics, and Cipher scans all fired. The bad news: the same core issues persist. No newsletter for the third straight day (Aurora still sandbox-blocked), the HQ API returns 401 on the data endpoint (28 consecutive sentinel failures), and several data files exist on disk but have zero rendering code in hq.html, meaning they're invisible to users. Nel's health score dropped from 85 to 65 — a regression driven by accumulated unresolved findings. The system is monitoring well but not remediating. An interactive Kai session on the Mini is required to break the logjam.
